titleStmt.title: SII 28.221: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 221. (A.R. No. 376 of 1913.)

summary.p: CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.
Naṭarāja temple, north wall of the Kaṟpaka-vināyakar temple at the western gōpuram.

p.hi: Dēvarāya Śaka 1349, Plavaṅga, Mīna, śu.5, Sunday, Rōhiṇī = 1428 A.D., March 21.

summary.p: One stone containing portions of the middle of the lines of the record is missing. However, the available text makes it clear that it was a royal order issued on the submission made by the paṉ-mahēśvaras and Marudavaṉachchivaṉ restricting the collection of levies from the deyvasthānas (lands belonging to the difference temples) to śūla-vari and prohibiting the levy of kaṟpūra-kkāṇikkai, karaṇakkar-jōḍi and viśēshādāyam, from the same. It was also ordered that the dēvadāna and tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam (lands endowed to the Śaivite and Vaishṇavite temples) not to be given away on lease and no portion of the same may be given away as kāṇi-āṭchi-iṟai-ili (tax-free land as remuneration for doing the service of administration of land), bhū-dāṉam (land-gift) and bhaṭṭa-vṟitti (maintenace of brahmins). This order became necessary because the above-stated prohibited levies began to be collected from the said lands on royal account, to pay which the temple authorities seem to have been obliged to mortgage the lands to the ūravar, who refused to release the lands subsequently which circumstance inturn resulted in the workers on the soil (kuḍi) deserting the dēvasthāna villages.

It appears that the above was an order applicable to some other templelands in the region also as in continuation of this record, it is stated that the worship of God Tiruvambalam-uḍaiya-nāyiṉār may be carried on as per old scale (pūṟuva-mariyādi) under the supervision of Tripurāri-chchivaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran śrīman Irājādhirājan Irājaparameśvaran śrīvirapratāpa devarāya śakābdam 1000 3 100 4 10 9ṉ mel cel
lā niṉṟa pilavaṅka varuṣam mīna nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai peṟṟa rohiṇi nāḷ Irāyar Irāyasappa �ppaḷḷi vaḻutilampaṭṭu Ucāvaṭikaḷ palataḷi deva
stānattil tānattāṟkum Anta Anta Ucāvaṭikaḷil sarvvamānnya deyvastānattil tānattārkkum taṅkaḷ devastānattil Araimaṉaikkuc ce ṇikkai Eṉṟum Aracupeṟu Eṉṟum kāṇikkar co
ṭi Eṉṟum viceṣātāyam Eṉṟum pala Upāti Eṉṟum Āḷamañci Eṉṟum palamukattilum Atta kaḷ Aṉṉiyāyattile Eṭuttuk koṇṭu pattar tammuṭaiya kaiyil Urakkam Iṭṭu
k koṇṭu kuṭutta pūmiyai cilāśāsaṉam Āka paṇṇik kuṭutta pūmi Uḷḷatu Uṭaiyavarkku pūṟuva mutalāka cellukiṟattai Ūrkka Anta Ūravar Ottik koṇṭu nilam viṭā
mal Utteṇṭam paṇṇukiṟārkaḷ Eṉṟum devastānaṅkaḷil Ūrkaḷil kuṭi Uḷḷatu Oṭippoy Uṭaiyavar Aṅkaraṅkapoka pūcai tiruppaṇi ṟu paṉmāheśvararum marutavaccivaṉum vantu
namakku viṇṇappañ ceytapaṭiāle taṅkaḷ teyvastānaṅkaḷil cūlavarip poṉ Allāte kaṟpūrakkāṇikkai karaṇakkar coṭi Aracu m Āḷ Amañci Eṉṟu Upatturokam paṇṇātapaṭi
kkum kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇit taraveṇum Eṉṟum deyvastāṉaṅkaḷil tirunāmattukkāṇi tevatāṉattil nilaṅkaḷai Ūravar Otti Aṭaciṉa ni ṇi taṅkaḷ stāṉaṅkaḷukku pūrvvam mari Āti māhe
śvararaiyum marutavaṉaccivaṉaiyum mun Iṭṭuṭaittavum coḻamaṇṭalam tiruviṭaimarutūr Ārāṭci nāyaṉān pūṟuvam mutal Āka sarvva rvvamariyātiyile pūcai punaskāraṅkaḷaiyum
marutavaṉaccivaṉai muṉṉiṭṭu pūrvvamariyātiyile naṭakkumpaṭikku tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟi Aruḷiṉapaṭi Āle Ammariyātiyile pūcaipu le Irukkavum tevatāṉam tiruviṭai vūṭṭa
ttil kuttakai kuṭātoḻiyavum kāṇi Āṭci Iṟaiyili Eṉṟum pūtāṉam Eṉṟum paṭṭavṛtti Eṉṟum viṭak kaṭavatallavākavum va ku naṭuppaṭṭa paṟṟu tiruvampayam Uṭaiya nayi
ṉār pūcai puṉaskāraṅkaḷ tirupurāric civaṉai muṉṉiṭṭuk koṇṭu pūṟuva mariyāti naṭattikkoḷḷavum § taruvakkaḷil pukka —
ttimmaṉaiyum varakkāṭṭiṉom §
Digital edition of SII 28.221 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
